tasks.title: Implement 'ralph queue complete' command to finish tasks
evidence: Existing queue.rs has complete_task function for moving tasks to done archive
CLI has queue complete subcommand defined in main.rs
plan: Review existing complete_task implementation in queue.rs
Verify CLI command routing for 'queue complete' in main.rs
Test the complete command with various status transitions (done, rejected)
Test with --note flag for adding completion notes
Add tests for edge cases (non-existent task, already terminal status)

tasks.title: Implement 'ralph queue prune' to clean up done.json
evidence: User request: 'Implement ralph queue prune to clean up done.json (Medium)'
plan: Add queue prune subcommand to CLI
Add --age flag to prune tasks older than N days
Add --status flag to prune only certain statuses
Add --keep-last flag to always keep N most recent tasks
Add tests for prune behavior
tasks.request: New Tasks (Top 10): 5. RQ-0136: Implement 'ralph queue prune' to clean up done.json (Medium)

tasks.title: Optimize validate_queue_set for large done files
evidence: validate_queue_set is slow with large done.json files
User request: 'Optimize validate_queue_set for large done files (Medium)'
plan: Profile current validation to identify bottlenecks
Use HashSet for ID deduplication check instead of nested loops
Add streaming validation for very large files
Add benchmark tests for validation performance

tasks.title: Implement 'ralph task edit' command
evidence: No way to edit existing tasks from CLI
User request: 'Implement ralph task edit command (Medium)'
plan: Add task edit subcommand with --id flag
Support editing title, status, priority, tags via flags
Support $EDITOR for full task JSON editing
Add tests for edit operations

tasks.title: Support 'draft' task status
evidence: Need a way to create tasks that aren't ready to run
plan: Add 'draft' to task status enum
Filter draft tasks out of 'run one' and 'run loop' by default
Add --include-draft flag to run commands
Add 'ralph task ready' command to promote draft to todo
Add tests for draft task behavior
tasks.request: New Tasks (Top 10): 9. RQ-0147: Support 'draft' task status (Medium)

tasks.title: Expose explicit ID targeting in 'ralph run one'
evidence: Cannot run a specific task by ID
User request: 'Expose explicit ID targeting in ralph run one (Medium)'
plan: Add --id flag to 'run one' command
When --id is specified, run that exact task instead of queue next
Validate task exists and is in runnable state
Add tests for ID targeting
